욥기 11:2.content: “Shouldn’t the multitude of words be answered? Should a man full of talk be justified?

욥기 11:3.content: Should your boastings make men hold their peace? When you mock, will no man make you ashamed?

욥기 11:4.content: For you say, ‘My doctrine is pure. I am clean in your eyes.’

욥기 11:5.content: But oh that God would speak, and open his lips against you,

욥기 11:6.content: that he would show you the secrets of wisdom! For true wisdom has two sides. Know therefore that God exacts of you less than your iniquity deserves.

욥기 11:7.content: “Can you fathom the mystery of God? Or can you probe the limits of the Almighty?

욥기 11:8.content: They are high as heaven. What can you do? They are deeper than Sheol. What can you know?

욥기 11:9.content: Its measure is longer than the earth, and broader than the sea.

욥기 11:10.content: If he passes by, or confines, or convenes a court, then who can oppose him?

욥기 11:11.content: For he knows false men. He sees iniquity also, even though he doesn’t consider it.

욥기 11:12.content: An empty-headed man becomes wise when a man is born as a wild donkey’s colt.

욥기 11:13.content: “If you set your heart aright, stretch out your hands toward him.

욥기 11:14.content: If iniquity is in your hand, put it far away. Don’t let unrighteousness dwell in your tents.

욥기 11:15.content: Surely then you will lift up your face without spot; Yes, you will be steadfast, and will not fear:

욥기 11:16.content: for you will forget your misery. You will remember it like waters that have passed away.

욥기 11:17.content: Life will be clearer than the noonday. Though there is darkness, it will be as the morning.

욥기 11:18.content: You will be secure, because there is hope. Yes, you will search, and will take your rest in safety.

욥기 11:19.content: Also you will lie down, and no one will make you afraid. Yes, many will court your favor.

욥기 11:20.content: But the eyes of the wicked will fail. They will have no way to flee. Their hope will be the giving up of the spirit.”
